title: Ideas Database
_comment: Schema for the Moonlight Ideas Database. Pass to Notion MCP create-database. Property order matches the original author's preferred at-a-glance scan order. Note: the RICE expression inlined inside Opportunity Score differs slightly from the standalone RICE Score formula (3-way vs 4-way Impact mapping, no effort zero-guard). This matches the original author's setup and is preserved intentionally.

properties.name: Verdict
properties._note: 6-tier recommendation based on Opportunity Score thresholds: ≥4 Strong Go, ≥3.5 High Conviction, ≥3 Side Bet, ≥2.5 Conditional Go, ≥2 Weak Maybe, else Hard No. Opportunity expression is inlined (verbatim from live workspace).
properties.expression: if(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Minimal (1)", 1, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, 0)))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / if(prop("Effort (weeks)") == 0, 1, prop("Effort (weeks)"))) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) >= 4, "🔥 Strong Go", if(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Minimal (1)", 1, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, 0)))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / if(prop("Effort (weeks)") == 0, 1, prop("Effort (weeks)"))) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) >= 3.5, "🟢 High Conviction", if(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Minimal (1)", 1, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, 0)))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / if(prop("Effort (weeks)") == 0, 1, prop("Effort (weeks)"))) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) >= 3, "✅ Side Bet", if(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Minimal (1)", 1, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, 0)))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / if(prop("Effort (weeks)") == 0, 1, prop("Effort (weeks)"))) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) >= 2.5, "🔶 Conditional Go", if(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Minimal (1)", 1, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, 0)))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / if(prop("Effort (weeks)") == 0, 1, prop("Effort (weeks)"))) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) >= 2, "🟡 Weak Maybe", "🚫 Hard No")))))

properties.name: Opportunity Score (/5)
properties._note: Composite weighted score, rounded to 2 decimals. Weights: RICE_normalized 0.35, Moat 0.1, Unfair Advantage 0.1, Revenue Potential 0.2, Competitive Window 0.15, Time-to-$10k inverted 0.1. RICE normalized as min(5, RICE/2000). The RICE expression is inlined here (not referencing prop("RICE Score")). Note: Impact mapping defaults to 1 (not 0) and Effort is not guarded — minor divergence from the standalone RICE Score formula below.
properties.expression: round(((((((min(5, (((prop("SOM (users/mo)") * if(prop("Impact") == "Transformative (3)", 3, if(prop("Impact") == "Significant (2)", 2, 1))) * prop("Confidence (/1.0)")) / prop("Effort (weeks)")) / 2000) * 0.35) + (prop("Moat (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Unfair Advantage (/5)") * 0.1)) + (prop("Revenue Potential (/5)") * 0.2)) + (prop("Competitive Window (/5)") * 0.15)) + (max(0, 5 - (prop("Time to $10k (months)") / 6)) * 0.1)) * 100) / 100

properties.name: RICE Score
properties._note: Reach (SOM/month) × Impact × Confidence ÷ Effort. Effort guarded with max(Effort, 1) to prevent div-by-zero or negatives. Impact is a Select; mapped 1/2/3 based on option name (defaults to 0 if unset).
